### [1] Diagnosis and treatment of type 1 diabetes at the dawn of the personalized medicine era.
**Authors**: Akil AA, Yassin E, Al-Maraghi A  
**Journal**: J Transl Med (2021)  
**PMID**: 33794915 | **URL**: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33794915/  
**MeSH**:

The evidence supports the use of a multi-faceted approach, combining insulin therapy, lifestyle modifications, and exercise, as recommended by the ADA guidelines. Risk stratification is crucial for identifying patients who may benefit most from early intervention and personalized treatment plans.
